title: Issue #89 GitLab provider hardening
description: Consume #89 Issue Fix Request with Roadmap-Sliced Development and align GitLab provider hardening gaps with the current GitHub baseline.

decisions.q: 当前 roadmap 的发布边界是什么？
decisions.answer: 以 GitHub 侧当前实现为事实 baseline，对齐 GitLab provider 的全量可用链路；无法回避的平台差异记录为窄例外。
decisions.note: 目标不是第一版/第二版式切断，而是用有序 slice 分阶段实现同一个完整目标，避免后续 agent 误判为 job done。

1-1.label: 消费 #89 request 并建立 roadmap 分支

decisions.q: 如何消费 #89 的 Issue Fix Request？
decisions.answer: 复用 source issue #89 作为 carrier，在 dedicated roadmap branch 上执行 Roadmap-Sliced Development，不创建新的独立 Issue Fix Request。
decisions.note: #89 已有 structured issue-fix-request comment ifr_triage_6b1bcf67fbf9；后续 PR closeout 和 source issue 生命周期都围绕 #89 回放。

1-2.label: GitLab 安装可运行性硬化

1-3.label: GitLab vendored 包与离线边界硬化

1-4.label: Provider-aware 文案与路径协议对齐

1-5.label: GitLab consumer 合约与 closeout 兼容

1-6.label: GitLab 全链路验证与 closeout

1-1-1.label: 记录 Issue Fix Request 消费证据
1-1-1.notes: Verification gate: Issue Fix Request carrier exists on #89, branch zjal/issue-89-gitlab-provider-hardening created, process roadmap initialized, #89 gaps mapped to executable leaf nodes, and Roadmap-Sliced consumption evidence appended to #89. Evidence: Issue Fix Request https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/issues/89#issuecomment-4934172412; start command https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/issues/89#issuecomment-4934184631; consumed comment https://github.com/jununfly/ZAgenticLoop/issues/89#issuecomment-4934232352; branch zjal/issue-89-gitlab-provider-hardening.

1-2-1.label: GitLab CI stage 配置化
1-2-1.notes: Commit intent: make GitLab CI stage configurable at generation time. Implemented --gitlab-stage for zj-loop-init --add/--upgrade gitlab-ci; GitLab templates now render __ZJ_LOOP_GITLAB_STAGE__ into root stages and job stage fields; README/README.zh-CN/Quickstart document using --gitlab-stage Fallback for fixed-stage GitLab projects. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-init; npm run check:zj-loop-init; npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate; git diff --check.

1-2-2.label: GitLab runner tags 配置化
1-2-2.notes: Commit intent: make GitLab runner tags configurable at generation time. Implemented --gitlab-runner-tags for zj-loop-init --add/--upgrade gitlab-ci; GitLab templates now render an optional tags list into every generated job and omit tags by default; README/README.zh-CN/Quickstart document pending-job runner tag usage. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-init; npm run check:zj-loop-init; npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate; git diff --check.

1-2-3.label: GitLab CI image 与 Node 版本前置检查
1-2-3.notes: Commit intent: make GitLab CI image configurable and fail fast on unsupported Node versions. Implemented --gitlab-image for zj-loop-init --add/--upgrade gitlab-ci; templates now render image from the install command and run a Node >=18 precheck before package commands; README/README.zh-CN/Quickstart document private/dependency-proxy Node 18+ image usage. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-init; npm run check:zj-loop-init; npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate; git diff --check.

1-3-1.label: vendored tgz git 跟踪预检
1-3-1.notes: Commit intent: make ignored vendored tarballs visible during GitLab CI bundle install/upgrade. Implemented a deterministic vendor tarball tracking preflight for zj-loop-init --add/--upgrade gitlab-ci; it checks git ignore behavior or .gitignore patterns for zj-loop/vendor/*.tgz and prints explicit .gitignore exception / git add -f next steps; README/README.zh-CN/Quickstart document the warning. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-init; npm run check:zj-loop-init; npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate; git diff --check.

1-3-2.label: GitLab smoke audit 离线边界显式化
1-3-2.notes: Commit intent: make GitLab smoke audit network boundary explicit. Added ZJ_LOOP_RUN_AUDIT defaulting to 1 in the GitLab smoke job and made audit execution conditional so restricted CI can set ZJ_LOOP_RUN_AUDIT=0 while still producing route-decision.json and consumer-plan.json; README/README.zh-CN/Quickstart document route-only smoke. Verification: npm test in tools/zj-loop-init; npm run check:zj-loop-init; npm run test:generated-bundle-release-gate; git diff --check.

1-3-3.label: core tarball transitive dependency 边界说明
1-3-3.notes: Commit intent: clarify that the standard GitLab adapter is online/cache-backed, not fully offline. Added durable provider adapter architecture text explaining that vendored package tarballs alone do not include transitive dependencies; README/README.zh-CN/Quickstart now warn that npm exec may still need registry access or a prepared npm cache. Verification: git diff --check; roadmap_cli validate.

1-4-1.label: route-table maturity vocabulary 对齐
1-4-1.notes: Commit intent: align audit maturity vocabulary with core/generated Route Table values. Updated zj-loop-audit maturity levels to accept install-ready and execution-ready, aligned live runner readiness wording with core, and added regression coverage for install-ready route maturity. Verification: npm run build in tools/zj-loop-audit; node --test tools/zj-loop-audit/test/auditor.test.mjs; node dist/cli.js ../.. in tools/zj-loop-audit; git diff --check.

1-4-2.label: ci-sweeper GitLab 路径建议 provider-aware
1-4-2.notes: Commit intent: make CI Sweeper Issue Fix Request fix scope provider-aware. Implemented deterministic provider-specific files_or_areas: GitHub keeps .github/workflows/, GitLab uses .gitlab-ci.yml and zj-loop/gitlab-ci/ while retaining scripts/ and zj-loop/. Regression tests assert GitLab request bodies do not point to .github/workflows/. Verification: npm run build in tools/zj-loop-core; npm test in tools/zj-loop-core; git diff --check.

1-5-1.label: roadmap activation MR 到 post-merge closeout 合约桥接
1-5-1.notes: Commit intent: bridge Roadmap Activation review contracts to Post-Merge Closeout. Roadmap Activation PR/MR contract output now embeds a parseable zj-loop.post-merge-contract YAML block, so merged GitHub PRs and GitLab MRs can be consumed by Post-Merge Closeout without a separate human-added closeout contract. GitLab MR tests prove the generated body parses through Post-Merge Closeout and reaches dry-run with valid guards. Verification: npm run build in tools/zj-loop-core; npm test in tools/zj-loop-core; git diff --check.

1-5-2.label: pr-steward report 与 fix-request 命令边界澄清

1-6-1.label: GitLab provider dogfood 回放测试补强

1-6-2.label: durable docs 与 PR closeout 吸收 GitLab 决策
